channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: Dog and cat form unlikely friendship
item.description: ABC News' Danny New explains how an illness turned one woman's dog and cat into best friends.

item.title: Himes calls Pulte intelligence role Trump's most dangerous appointment
item.description: The top House Intelligence Democrat said the timing jeopardizes FISA Section 702 reauthorization.

item.title: Read full 2026 transcripts of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan"
item.description: Browse all full episode transcripts from 2026 of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan."

item.title: 2026 Tony Awards winners: See the full list
item.description: "Schmigadoon!" won Best Musical, and "Liberation" took Best Play at the 2026 Tony Awards.
